question_text: A free hydrogen atom after absorbing a photon of wavelength $$\lambda $$a gets excited from the state n = 1 to the state n = 4. If $${{{\lambda _a}} \over {{\lambda _e}}} = {1 \over 5}$$, which of the option(s) is/are correct?
